title: Allow Date in Calendar in Group, First ColumnItem Terminology
excerpt:
In a Monday Group, my organization needs to have the first column/item terminology to be a date-a clickable calendar. This doesn’t seem to be the case presently. 
It would be very helpful.

posts.author: VPPR (Barry Koblenz)
posts.cookedHtml:
In a Monday Group, my organization needs to have the first column/item terminology to be a date-a clickable calendar. This doesn’t seem to be the case presently.

It would be very helpful.
